title: GraveStonePlugin
description: Places a gravestone with your inventory items inside when you die
body:
# Basic Functionality

Every time you die, a grave will appear at your location. To retrieve your items, simply click on it while sneaking (Shift) or break the grave. You can customize everything in the config.

**⚠️ IMPORTANT: You must install DecentHolograms on the server for the plugin to work properly!**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f74a9632c51cd333384b83b4fd7906f8eb7261f0.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/920d8d8044f499efd2708360874a10490ab4ef33.png)

Here’s an example of how to retrieve items from the grave: you can take them by Shift + right-click or left-click.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/909d5aea7795e0ad75c434b4b05d6025cd8745d4.gif)

# Obituary

Every time you die, you receive an obituary. If you don’t want it, you can disable it in the configuration.

It contains:

* The player’s name
* The dimension in which the player died
* The date of the player’s death
* The coordinates where the player died
* A list of all items the player had at the time of death

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98c580d27e8e455933abfb45d084ff689ae9a594.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/acd144be9e9682b4ec40b572591b9d20ca36d66f.png)

# Configuration

There are a few things you can change in the configuration:

* Chat messages
* Obituary title
* Disable the issuance of obituaries
* Allow other players to break graves

# Support

The plugin is in an early stage of development, so please don’t judge too harshly.

I’m porting the original GraveStone mod.

If you have questions or find bugs, contact me:

Telegram: AkymaGhoul

![bstats](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/GraveStone.svg)
